    let minTime = Infinity;
    const m = landStartTime.length;
    const n = waterStartTime.length;

            const waterStart = waterStartTime[j];

            const landStart = landStartTime[i];
            const case2End = Math.max(waterEnd, landStart) + landDuration[i];

    }
    
    return minTime;
}
